meaning: Basin 塔里木盆地 [新疆维吾尔自治区]
examples: China's Mystery Mummies takes viewers to the Tarim Basin.
The mountain barrier to the west of this tarim basin is high.
A case study of reservoir in the Tarim basin is presented in the article.
Most of China's shale gas resources are in the Sichuan and Tarim basins.
The Qaidam basin in Qinghai has quantities of natural gas, and the Tarim basin holds both oil and gas.
